channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Future astronauts may walk on rocks from deep inside the Moon
item.description: An ancient massive collision may have brought deep lunar material close to future Artemis landing sites. By recreating the impact, scientists suggest astronauts could access these rocks.

item.title: T. rex took 40 years to reach full size, study finds
item.description: Tyrannosaurus rex may have grown more slowly than previously thought. A study of 17 tyrannosaur fossils suggests the giant predator likely took about 40 years to reach its full size.

item.title: Butterfly that barely ages could help unlock longevity secrets
item.description: Scientists discovered that Heliconius butterflies have evolved an extraordinary lifespan, living several times longer than closely related species.

item.title: As lakes turn brown, trout and bass decline while pike and walleye thrive
item.description: Freshwater lakes across North America and Europe are becoming noticeably browner, reducing underwater visibility and reshaping fish populations.
